hero.title: Hairspray
hero.reason: In honor of Social Media Day, Hairspray is a film that celebrates self-expression and the power of social influence, showcasing the impact of dance and music on a community.
hero.blurb: This upbeat musical comedy is a fun and energetic ride, with great performances and catchy songs. It's a movie that will leave you smiling and feeling inspired.

released.title: License to Wed
released.reason: Released today in 2007, License to Wed is a romantic comedy that still brings laughs and heart, thanks to its witty dialogue and charming cast.
released.blurb: This lighthearted film is perfect for a summer evening, with its fun and quirky take on love and relationships. The chemistry between the leads is undeniable, making for a sweet and entertaining watch.

birthday.title: The 'Burbs
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Vincent D'Onofrio, The 'Burbs is a classic comedy that showcases his unique talent and versatility as an actor, in a film that perfectly blends humor and suspense.
birthday.blurb: This cult classic is a must-see for its clever writing and impressive cast, with D'Onofrio delivering a standout performance. The film's blend of dark humor and satire makes for a hilarious and thought-provoking watch.

awful.title: I Know Who Killed Me
awful.reason: This psychological thriller is infamous for its convoluted plot and poor acting, making it a so-bad-it's-good watch for fans of campy cinema.
awful.blurb: With a mess of a storyline and cringe-worthy performances, I Know Who Killed Me is a trainwreck that's impossible to look away from. It's a fascinatingly bad film that will leave you wondering what went wrong.
